payload.long_description: Partial black glass-front fireplace with a glossy rectangular viewing panel and dark unlit interior; top surround appears jagged and cut off at the crop edge, and the reflective glass shows a lamp and stair railing reflection — appears roughly 2.0 m from the camera.
